positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for sporting_event_pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u13,axiom,
    tokyo != world_championships).

cnf(u12,axiom,
    united_states != world_championships).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    summer_olympics != tokyo).

cnf(u17,negated_conjecture,
    ~sporting_event(world_championships)).

cnf(u14,axiom,
    summer_olympics != united_states).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    summer_olympics != world_championships).

cnf(u11,axiom,
    tokyo != united_states).

cnf(u10,axiom,
    sporting_event(summer_olympics)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define last_summer_olympics_in(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define won_most_medals_in(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
